unused.label: Unused attachments
unused.description: Current scan snapshot. Queue selected attachments for delayed deletion instead of deleting immediately.
unused.deleteDescription: Selected attachments move to the pending deletion window and can still be restored before purge.
unused.drawerDescription: Inspect the scan metadata for this unused attachment.

pending.label: Pending deletions
pending.description: Attachments queued for deletion. Restore selected rows before the purge window expires.
pending.deleteDescription: Selected attachments are removed from the pending queue and remain in the Media Library.
pending.drawerDescription: Inspect queue metadata for this pending deletion.

scan.label: Scan
scan.description: Controls scheduled scans and manual scan execution.

safety.label: Deletion safety
safety.description: Delayed deletion and exclusion settings that reduce destructive risk.
